title: Jodek's Translations
description: Translations for datapacks/mods made by Jodek
body:
![minecraft resourecepack jodeks translations datapack mod translation](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/titles/jodeks_translations.png)
[![jodeks discord - discord badge - pixel badge - pixel discord badge - jodeks datapacks - datapacks discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/Discord.png)](https://discord.gg/z2n3qTzQY6)   [![datapacks jodek youtube](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/YouTube.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@jodek)   [![armor stand arms minecraft datapack github issues](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/GH_Issues.png)](https://github.com/jodeks-datapacks/jodeks-translations/issues)   [![jodeks datapacks kofi - jodek kofi - minecraft datapack kofi donation]( https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/Kofi.png)](https://ko-fi.com/jodek)   [![github sponsor jodek donation datapacks minecraft](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/GH_Sponsor.png)](https://github.com/sponsors/Jodekq)
Adds translations for my datapacks and mods, so you can enjoy them in your language! > 💡 If you notice any mistakes or want to help translate more languages, you’re very welcome to contribute! ## Included Translations Below is a list of which datapacks/mods currently include translations and which languages are available: | Datapack / Mod | Available Languages | |----------------|--------------------| | **Mob Heads** | 🇬🇧 English, 🇩🇪 German, 🇫🇷 French, 🇪🇸 Spanish, 🇯🇵 Japan, 🇨🇳 Chinese, 🇷🇺 Russian| | **Mob Heads Powers** | 🇬🇧 English, 🇩🇪 German, 🇫🇷 French, 🇪🇸 Spanish, 🇯🇵 Japan, 🇨🇳 Chinese, 🇷🇺 Russian| | *(More coming soon!)* | | ## Contribute You can help improve or add new translations! Simply visit the GitHub repository linked below and submit your changes: 🔗 **[GitHub Repository](https://github.com/jodeks-datapacks/Jodeks-Translations)** Every contribution helps make the packs more enjoyable for players around the world ❤️
